title: The Present Generation.
content:
Was it always as now? This race I truly can't fathom.
    Nothing is young but old age; youth, alas! only is old.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Friedrich Schiller, titled "The Present Generation.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
